headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Exxon Mobil (XOM) After Strong 1-Year Share Price Gains?
summary: Wondering if Exxon Mobil at US$150.62 is still a solid deal or if most of the easy upside is already priced in? This article focuses on what the current valuation really implies for you. The stock has been relatively steady over the past week and month, with a slight decline of 1.3% over 7 days and a 0.6% gain over 30 days. The longer term picture shows returns of 22.8% year to date and 42.2% over the past year. Recent headlines have centered on Exxon Mobil's role in global energy markets...
